query:
SELECT
                id::uuid as "event_id!: Id<Event<JsonValue>>",
                ts_orig as "ts_orig: Timestamp",
                ts_coided as "ts_coided!: Timestamp"
            FROM core.events
            WHERE ts_orig > NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
               OR ts_orig < '2020-01-01'::timestamptz
               OR ts_coided > NOW() + INTERVAL '1 hour'
            LIMIT $1
